## Added

- **npm pre-built native binaries for Linux x64, macOS arm64, Windows x64** (#335) -- `npm install thetadatadx` now works without a Rust toolchain. Platform-specific packages are selected automatically via `optionalDependencies`. Unsupported platforms get a clear error message at import time. CI publishes all platform packages with OIDC provenance.

Full changelog: https://github.com/userFRM/ThetaDataDx/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
